heading: Rewards: missing property
label: 2252 Rewards: missing property
text: The Secretary of Defense and the Secretary of each military department may pay a reward of not more than $500 in any case for information leading to the discovery of missing property under the jurisdiction of that Secretary or leading to the recovery of such property.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesSection is based on , , , 1202.Pub. L. 99–190, § 101(b) [title VIII, § 8005(b)]99 Stat. 1185Dec. 19, 1985
